name: chakrebd
description: Run API (4000) + Next.js (3000) together for local dev

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix chakrebd"
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run start:next --prefix chakrebd"
scripts.start:prod: npx concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run start:next --prefix chakrebd"
